_instructions: This is your Master CV. The JobAutoApply tool reads this as the source of truth for every tailored generation. Edit any field to refine. Add metrics where you can. Fields marked REPLACE_WITH are placeholders for you to fill in. The 'relevantFor' arrays on each work entry tell the AI which role types should include that experience.
rightToWork: Eligible to work in the United Kingdom on a Graduate (Post-Study Work) visa.
personalStatement: MSc-qualified Computer Science graduate and tech founder with hands-on experience building software products, managing e-commerce operations, and running a UK-registered company. Strong attention to detail, organised approach to multi-stream operations, and proven ability to deliver results across software development, data handling, and customer-facing roles. Looking for a stable role where I can contribute reliable, accurate work and continue developing professionally.

workExperience.summary: Founded and operate a UK-registered technology company (company number 15918408) building software, SaaS, and e-commerce products.
bullets: Built and launched multiple software products including ScreenshotCraft (an app store screenshot tool for game developers) and questionstrending.com (a social media content extraction platform).
Manage all company operations including Companies House filings, banking through Tide, accounting records, and HMRC compliance.
Run a Shopify e-commerce store (CleanCove Pets) including product page optimisation, cart functionality, and Meta advertising infrastructure.
Coordinate multiple parallel projects using structured planning documents (PRDs, TDDs, sprint plans) and agile delivery methods.
Developed full-stack web applications using Next.js, React, Node.js, and modern AI tools including the Claude API.

workExperience.summary: Operate a multi-platform food delivery service across central London and Brent zones using an electric moped.
bullets: Manage simultaneous operations across three delivery platforms, optimising acceptance decisions in real time to maximise efficiency.
Maintain a high on-time delivery rate across hundreds of orders per month while delivering excellent customer service.
Track all earnings, fuel costs, and tax records for HMRC self-assessment using spreadsheets and accounting tools.
Built strong knowledge of London routes, traffic patterns, and time-critical customer service standards.

workExperience.employer: Self-employed (Galaxy Labs and Moonland Metaverse projects)
workExperience.summary: Worked as a freelance game developer on mobile and metaverse projects after completing BSc and before starting MSc.
bullets: Built and shipped Crazy Chicken, a mobile game published on the Google Play Store.
Worked with Unity, C#, and 3D asset pipelines to deliver gameplay features and bug fixes.
Collaborated remotely with designers and artists to translate concepts into playable features.
Contributed to metaverse and 3D multiplayer browser game projects.

highlights: Studied advanced topics in software engineering, AI, and data systems.
Completed a dissertation project applying modern software development practices.
Foundation in programming, databases, networking, and web development.
Final year project in software development.
